director.name: 阿列克西·萨尔门佩雷 Aleksi Salmenperä

introduction: the series explores how and why coercive control-sometimes mistaken for love, can be the greatest danger in a relationship. One beautiful spring day, a woman meets a man and falls in love. At first, it looks like the love story of the century - until one day a crack appears. Slowly, nothing seems to work and all the love seems to vanish. The man controls his family with unpredictable bursts of rage, even in public. But why doesn’t the woman leave?
